EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The participant account {object.name} is created on host {event_src.host}
The participant account {object.name} is activated on host {event_src.host}
The participant account {object.name} is modified on host {event_src.host}
The participant account {object.name} is viewed on host {event_src.host}
The participant account {object.name} is deactivated on host {event_src.host}
